title: Define machine-readable snapshot profiles
goal: Define profile artifact rules for local-private, agent-portable, full-max, pr-review, security-export-review, public-share and ci-artifact

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Machine-readable RepoBrief snapshot profiles are present on Lenskit origin/main and verified; no Lenskit patch was required.

checks: python3 -m ruff check merger/lenskit/core/repobrief_profiles.py merger/lenskit/cli/cmd_repobrief.py merger/lenskit/core/export_safety_report.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_repobrief_profiles.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_repobrief_snapshot_cli.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_export_safety_report.py merger/lenskit/tests/test_cli_export_safety.py -> passed
acceptance_summary: all seven planned profile names are machine-readable
artifact rule values are explicit and limited to the profile requirement vocabulary
required core artifacts are required across profiles
no Lenskit source change was made during verification
